title: How do you know what I done
body:
# How Do You Know What I Done

This datapack(or mod) make all the advancements inside Minecraft to be hidden.
If you enjoy the thrill of unexpected advancements popping up while you're engaged in various activities, why not download it and have a try? 

[Chinese description link](https://www.mcmod.cn/class/13971.html)

## mod support:

<details>
<summary>mod support in 1.20-1.20.4</summary>
  
- Applied Energistics 2
- Botania
- Dimensional Doors
- Electrodynamics
- EvilCraft
- Good Night's Sleep
- Mekanism
- Mekanism addition
- Mekanism Tools
- PneumaticCraft: Repressurized
- ProjectE
- Quark
- Railcraft
- The Twilight Forest
- Ad Astra!
- Create
- Dark Utilities
- Advent of Ascension 3
- Crossroads
- Refined Storage
- Goety
- Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks
- Biomancy
- Ars Nouveau
- 
</details>

<details>
<summary>mod support in 1.20.5-1.21.1</summary>
Only Applied Energistics 2 Mod
</details>

KSmc_brigade has made a theoretically compatible version of all mods for this Datapack, if you have any questions, please give us feedback on github!
